close_reason: flake.nix python.lockFile = 'pylock.toml' regenerates .turnkey/sync.toml to use 'pydeps-gen --lock pylock.toml' with pylock.toml as the staleness source. Also fixed nix/packages/{compute-unified-features,gen-rust-buck}.nix to drop the deleted src/python/__init__.py reference and list each member root in PYTHONPATH for PEP 420 namespace resolution. User workflow for dep updates: uv lock && uv export --all-packages --format pylock.toml -o pylock.toml, then tk sync.
description:
Current rule:
  sources = ['pyproject.toml']
  generator = ['pydeps-gen', '--pyproject', 'pyproject.toml']

Target rule (so dep changes in any member trigger regen):
  sources  = ['pyproject.toml', 'src/python/*/pyproject.toml', 'src/examples/python-*/pyproject.toml', 'uv.lock']
  generator = needs to run 'uv lock && uv export --format pylock.toml -o pylock.toml && pydeps-gen --lock pylock.toml'

Check first whether any existing generator in sync.toml is multi-step. If not, options are:
- Add a small shell wrapper script in nix/packages/ (e.g., 'uv-pydeps-sync.sh') invoked as the generator.
- Extend the sync runner to support multi-command generators.

Pick whichever fits the codebase pattern.
title: Update .turnkey/sync.toml for uv workspace pipeline
